---
title: "Publications"
---

## Papers

- **Your Name**, A. Coauthor, B. Coauthor. *Paper title*. Journal Name, 2025. [[code](https://selinazitrone.github.io/tools_and_tips/sessions/17_quarto-website.html)] [[doi]()]
- A. Coauthor\*, **Your Name**\*. *Paper title*. Conference Name, 2025. [[doi](#)]
- **Your Name**, C. Coauthor. *Paper title*. Journal Name, 2024. [[doi](#)]
- asdfasdf

## Talks

- *Talk title*. Conference Name, City, 2025.
- *Talk title*. Workshop Name, City, 2024. [[slides](#)]
- *Talk title*. Invited seminar, University of Somewhere, 2024.

## Other

- **Your Name**. *Paper title*. Preprint, 2025. [[preprint](#)]
- **Your Name**. *Blog post/report title*. 2024. [[link](#)]
